title: Totem of Goat
description: Turns Totems into Goats that scream
body:
# **Totem of Goat**

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xooyWcnH/images/b328571b7e32ad0b47c7caec743283f87b8173a9.png)

***

### Turns your _BORING_ totems into **AWESOME 3D GOATS** and when they pop they _SCREAM!?!??!?!_

###### _It doesen't hurt to try!_

***

They **SIT** on your shoulder and when your in _first person_ it appears at the **top of your screen** for less _obstruction_ instead of appearing in your hand!

_Idea comes from the player at the top of your screen (bedrock edition)_

***

They **HANG??** out _item frames_ just chillin. And _float_ around on the **ground**.  
They also just **CHILL** on your head if you can manage to get them on there!

And for the extra _aesthetic_ it's given its own **NAME??** The ***Totem of Goat*** but it _sadly_ only works with **English (United Kingdom)** and **English (US)**

***

Check out the _gallery images_ then **DOWNLOAD**!

***

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xooyWcnH/images/021b360636e97862bab4da8ea6cea40e414381e0.png)
